베드로전서 1:1.content: Peter, an apostle of Jesus Christ, to the chosen ones who are living as foreigners in the Dispersion in Pontus, Galatia, Cappadocia, Asia, and Bithynia,

베드로전서 1:2.content: according to the foreknowledge of God the Father, in sanctification of the Spirit, that you may obey Jesus Christ and be sprinkled with his blood: Grace to you and peace be multiplied.

베드로전서 1:3.content: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, who according to his great mercy caused us to be born again to a living hope through the resurrection of Jesus Christ from the dead,

베드로전서 1:4.content: to an incorruptible and undefiled inheritance that doesn’t fade away, reserved in Heaven for you,

베드로전서 1:5.content: who by the power of God are guarded through faith for a salvation ready to be revealed in the last time.

베드로전서 1:6.content: Wherein you greatly rejoice, though now for a little while, if need be, you have been grieved in various trials,

베드로전서 1:7.content: that the proof of your faith, which is more precious than gold that perishes even though it is tested by fire, may be found to result in praise, glory, and honor at the revelation of Jesus Christ—

베드로전서 1:8.content: whom, not having known, you love. In him, though now you don’t see him, yet believing, you rejoice greatly with joy that is unspeakable and full of glory,

베드로전서 1:9.content: receiving the result of your faith, the salvation of your souls.

베드로전서 1:10.content: Concerning this salvation, the prophets sought and searched diligently. They prophesied of the grace that would come to you,

베드로전서 1:11.content: searching for who or what kind of time the Spirit of Christ, which was in them, pointed to, when he predicted the sufferings of Christ, and the glories that would follow them.

베드로전서 1:12.content: To them it was revealed, that they served not to themselves, but to you, in these things, which now have been announced to you through those who preached the Good News to you by the Holy Spirit sent out from heaven; which things angels desire to look into.

베드로전서 1:13.content: Therefore prepare your minds for action. Be sober, and set your hope fully on the grace that will be brought to you at the revelation of Jesus Christ—

베드로전서 1:14.content: as children of obedience, not conforming yourselves according to your former lusts as in your ignorance,

베드로전서 1:15.content: but just as he who called you is holy, you yourselves also be holy in all of your behavior;

베드로전서 1:16.content: because it is written, “You shall be holy; for I am holy.”

베드로전서 1:17.content: If you call on him as Father, who without respect of persons judges according to each man’s work, pass the time of your living as foreigners here in reverent fear,

베드로전서 1:18.content: knowing that you were redeemed, not with corruptible things, with silver or gold, from the useless way of life handed down from your fathers,

베드로전서 1:19.content: but with precious blood, as of a lamb without blemish or spot, the blood of Christ,

베드로전서 1:20.content: who was foreknown indeed before the foundation of the world, but was revealed in this last age for your sake,

베드로전서 1:21.content: who through him are believers in God, who raised him from the dead, and gave him glory, so that your faith and hope might be in God.

베드로전서 1:22.content: Seeing you have purified your souls in your obedience to the truth through the Spirit in sincere brotherly affection, love one another from the heart fervently,

베드로전서 1:23.content: having been born again, not of corruptible seed, but of incorruptible, through the word of God, which lives and remains forever.

베드로전서 1:24.content: For, “All flesh is like grass, and all of man’s glory like the flower in the grass. The grass withers, and its flower falls;

베드로전서 1:25.content: but the Lord’s word endures forever.” This is the word of Good News which was preached to you.
